description: Sector overlay for South African software, SaaS, platforms, cloud, digital services, cybersecurity, data protection, e-commerce, and technology-service documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Technology. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: POPIA privacy notice and processing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, POPIA, responsible party, operator, purpose, or data-subject rights evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Operator/processor and third-party data controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for operator agreement, processor, subprocessor, third-party sharing, cross-border transfer, or security safeguards evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: POPIA operator and security safeguard controls

rules.title: Cybersecurity incident response evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for cyber incident, security breach, incident response, logging, vulnerability, or notification controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Electronic transaction or e-commerce disclosure evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for electronic terms, online transaction, supplier disclosure, cancellation, or records evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Digital consumer complaint or service-level evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for complaints, support, service level, refund, limitation, or user-redress controls.
